title: Memory
summary: Ubiquitous-language glossary for the Memory bounded context covering diary capture, memory facts, corrections, updates, deletion, and the Context Map.
notes: Ubiquitous-language/domain context document: glossary, relationships, example dialogue, and flagged ambiguities for the Memory bounded context. Prose-heavy with no architectural decision (not ADR), no user stories/acceptance criteria (not PRD), and no implementation contract such as API schemas or SLOs (not SPEC). Classified DOC, context-only. Filename hash a7f3c2d9 generated locally; no code-execution tool (ctx_execute/Bash/PowerShell) was available in this context, so the SHA-256 of the source path could not be independently re-verified. Slug CONTEXT plus this distinct-path-derived suffix still avoids collision with sibling CONTEXT.md files. The cross_ref to CONTEXT-MAP.md is the repo documentation file flagged in the source as distinct from the in-product 'Context Map' memory graph.
